# 
Welcome to StretchLab South Loop 
[ Memberships ](https://www.stretchlab.com/location/southloop#memberships) [View Schedule](https://www.stretchlab.com/location/southloop#schedule)
![StretchLab instructor assisting person with stretch](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/400-tall.jpg)
First 50-Minute Stretch & Mobility Assessment For Only $69!
[Book Now](https://members.stretchlab.com/simple-book/classes?location=southloop&offer_id=full-length-intro-stretch-for-40-off&)
- South Loop [ 1351 S. Michigan Ave  
Chicago, IL 60605 US ](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=StretchLab%20South%20Loop%20|%20Stretch%20Studios%201351%20S.%20Michigan%20Ave%20Chicago,%20IL%2060605)
Our bright, airy South Loop studio is located at 1351 S. Michigan Ave, just a few blocks south of the Roosevelt CTA station. The studio is easily accessible from Chicago’s downtown business district and nearby neighborhoods including Pilsen, Bridgeport, and Bronzeville. You’ll find us near popular local destinations such as Overflow Coffee, The Chicago Firehouse restaurant, AIR Aerial Fitness, Jewel, and Trader Joe’s.
+1 (312) 857-5744    

southloop@stretchlab.com
Mon: 7am-6pm
Tue & Wed: 7am-7pm
Thu: 12pm-7pm
Fri: 7am-2pm
Sat & Sun: 8am-2pm

* * *
Why Stretch?  Benefits  What to Expect 
##  The StretchLab Difference 
Don't just stretch - get stretched. StretchLab's team of highly trained Flexologists® will give you a deeper stretch than you could ever achieve on your own. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/stretches/)
##  Reclaim your Freedom 
Imagine standing taller, running faster, bending easier – now make that a reality. Assisted stretching will improve your range of motion, flexibility and reduce pain and tension. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/benefits/)
##  Get Ready to Live Long 
Never been to StretchLab? You’re in for a treat. Our studios are open, fun & energetic! Your stretch will be customized to fit your body's needs and help you meet your flexibility goals. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/first-timers/)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Location_Pre-Open/PreOpen_SLdifference.jpg)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Location_Pre-Open/PreOpen_SLdifference.jpg)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Location_Pre-Open/PreOpen_SLdifference.jpg)
##  Flexologists 
![Robert](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/an_bWjKQkB8BGjrmeemuD48r7uDbZLPH0IR_fzREqdw/464x568.png)
Robert 
Flexologist 
Robert was the first Flexologist to join our team at StretchLab South Loop and now has over 3500 hours of expertise in assisted stretching. With a B.S. in Exercise Science and a background in personal training, Robert has built a strong foundation in evidence-based fitness and individualized programming. Since joining StretchLab, he’s worked with clients of all ages and activity levels, helping improve flexibility, mobility, and overall movement quality. Robert is especially passionate about connecting the science of exercise with real-world results—whether that means reducing tightness, easing discomfort, or unlocking better performance in daily life. He believes investing in your health is the best decision you can make, and he brings that philosophy to every session. Book a session with Robert and experience how stretching can elevate your energy, activity, and quality of life! 
![Eli](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/UmPA9qC1d65I93gZ9BUcgdBjJhx19jO2M3DMSk6lhN4/2048x2512.jpg)
Eli 
Flexologist 
Eli has been with StretchLab South Loop for over 3 years and has extensive experience in providing personalized programming for her 1-on-1 assisted stretching clients. She earned her B.S. in Kinesiology at UIC and spent 3+ years in the rehabilitation and recovery space prior to joining StretchLab. Eli also has her personal training certification, but has recently turned her career focus toward a different field with a long-term goal of becoming a project manager. With StretchLab, Eli loves working one-on-one with her members and clients to give you the ability to accomplish your daily activities and hobbies with less pain and greater freedom of movement. Eli was originally drawn to fitness and wellness by an increased awareness of her own genetic risk factors. This led her to make some drastic life changes of her own, embracing rock climbing, biking, pilates, yoga and running to take an active role in her own health and decrease those risks. She can’t wait to support and empower you to do the same! 
![Jasmine](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/67lc1wtVAps15sMheosSkUhcnQajy2ejYatRYjlEdjg/450x631.png)
Jasmine 
Flexologist 
Jasmine is an East Coast transplant, relocated to Chicago from Maryland by way of Virginia. She brings over 3 years of experience in boutique fitness, first as a Studio Manager with OrangeTheory and most recently as a Flexologist with StretchLab in Arlington, Virginia. Jasmine also has a strong passion for yoga, both as a practitioner and teacher. She loves her work with StretchLab as it allows her to meet people from all walks of life and help them reach their full potential (including Jasmine herself, keeping her accountable and “on her toes” with her yoga practice). 
![Mario](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/yDXf2e72QBqj-XmLqhfNYAKsT0-km2w8KbL0fYf4inA/480x604.jpg)
Mario 
Flexologist 
Mario graduated from Roosevelt University with his B.S. in Exercise Science and is currently completing his Radiology Tech degree. He grew up playing soccer and through his athletic career developed a deep appreciation for the importance of mobility and stretching, as well as a respect for rehabilitation and recovery. Prior to joining StretchLab, he honed his recovery skills as a Rehab Aide with Athletico. Mario brings a unique background of mobility expertise, athletic coaching and rehabilitation work to his StretchLab clients. When he’s not working or studying, Mario still plays soccer with friends and also really enjoys snowboarding which he picked up a few years ago. 
![Alan](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/Ut3h5bV56Z7dH-MFd_SvDedm2VEZEdMhH15rAaaSljU/448x560.png)
Alan 
Flexologist 
Alan earned his B.S. from Roosevelt University
